zh.lifeSummary: 當Marie de France於大約1198年出生在法國時，她的父親Philippe Auguste II,  roi de France34歲，母親Agnes-Maria von Andechs-Meranien Reine des Francs24歲。她於1212年與Philippe I 'le Noble' de Hainaut Comte de Namur在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇結婚。她去世於1238年8月15日在她的家鄉享年41歲，埋葬在比利時福拉阿姆-布拉班特洛文。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marie de France于大约1198年出生在法国时，她的父亲Philippe Auguste II,  roi de France34岁，母亲Agnes-Maria von Andechs-Meranien Reine des Francs24岁。她于1212年与Philippe I 'le Noble' de Hainaut Comte de Namur在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇结婚。她去世于1238年8月15日在她的家乡享年41岁，埋葬在比利时福拉阿姆-布拉班特洛文。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: France
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: ethnic name for someone from France (see 2 below).

French: habitational name given to someone from France (at the time when the name only applied to those lands belonging to the French king, covering only a small part of its current territory) or from Île-de-France (i.e. from a region centered on Paris); or, in southern France, an ethnic name for someone from what is now the northern half of the country, where the langue d'oïl (Old French as distinct from Occitan) was spoken. Compare   Defrance   and   Lafrance  .
Czech (Franče): from a pet form of František, Latin Franciscus (see Francis ).

variants.name: Defrance
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Henri, Jean-Paul.

French (mainly northern): habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, given to someone from France (at the time when the name only applied to those lands belonging to the French king, covering only a small part of its current territory) or from Île-de-France (i.e. from a region centered on Paris). Compare France .

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

en.lifeSummary: When Marie de France was born about 1198, in France, her father, Philippe Auguste II,  roi de France, was 34 and her mother, Agnes-Maria von Andechs-Meranien Reine des Francs, was 24. She married Philippe I 'le Noble' de Hainaut Comte de Namur in 1212, in Holy Roman Empire. She died on 15 August 1238, in her hometown, at the age of 41, and was buried in Leuven, Flemish Brabant, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marie de France est née environ 1198, à France, son père, Philippe Auguste II,  roi de France, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Agnes-Maria von Andechs-Meranien Reine des Francs, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Philippe I 'le Noble' de Hainaut Comte de Namur en 1212, à Saint-Empire romain. Elle est décédée le 15 août 1238, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Leuven, Brabant Flamand, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marie de France um 1198 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Philippe Auguste II,  roi de France 34 und ihre Mutter Agnes-Maria von Andechs-Meranien Reine des Francs 24. Sie hat 1212 in Heiliges Römisches Reich Philippe I 'le Noble' de Hainaut Comte de Namur geheiratet. Sie starb am 15. August 1238 im Alter von 41 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Leuven, Flämisch Brabant, Belgien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marie de France è nata il circa 1198 nel Francia, sua padre, Philippe Auguste II,  roi de France, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Agnes-Maria von Andechs-Meranien Reine des Francs, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Philippe I 'le Noble' de Hainaut Comte de Namur nel 1212, nel Heiliges Römisches Reich. Morì il 15 agosto 1238, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Belgio.

ja.lifeSummary: Marie de Franceが約1198年にフランスで生まれた時，父Philippe Auguste II,  roi de Franceは34歳，母Agnes-Maria von Andechs-Meranien Reine des Francsは24歳であった。1212年にヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチでPhilippe I 'le Noble' de Hainaut Comte de Namurと結婚した。彼女は1238年8月15日に故郷で41歳で死去し，ベルギーvラアムス-ブラバントレウベンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marie de France(이)가 대략 1198년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Philippe Auguste II,  roi de France(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes-Maria von Andechs-Meranien Reine des Francs(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1212년 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치에서 Philippe I 'le Noble' de Hainaut Comte de Namur(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1238년 8월 15일 그녀의 고향에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 벨기에 블라아스-브라반트 레우븐에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marie de France nasceu aproximadamente 1198, em França, seu pai, Philippe Auguste II,  roi de France, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Agnes-Maria von Andechs-Meranien Reine des Francs, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Philippe I 'le Noble' de Hainaut Comte de Namur em 1212, em Heiliges Römisches Reich. Ela faleceu em 15 de agosto de 1238, em sua cidade natal, com 41 anos, e foi sepultada em Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marie de France родилась около 1198 г. в местности Франция, её отцу по имени Philippe Auguste II,  roi de France было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes-Maria von Andechs-Meranien Reine des Francs, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Philippe I 'le Noble' de Hainaut Comte de Namur в 1212 г. в местности хилигесь рoмищесь раич. Она умерла 15 августа 1238 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности леувен, влаамс-брабант, Бельгия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marie de France nació aproximadamente 1198, en Francia, su papá, Philippe Auguste II,  roi de France, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Agnes-Maria von Andechs-Meranien Reine des Francs, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Philippe I 'le Noble' de Hainaut Comte de Namur en 1212, en Heiliges Römisches Reich. Murió el 15 de agosto de 1238, en su pueblo, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultada en Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica.
